sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from "react"; import "./Profile.css"; import Moon from "../../Image/moon.png"; import Mountain_behind from "../../Image/Mountain_behind.png"; import Mountain_front from "../../Image/Mountain_front.png"; import Stars from "../../Image/stars.png"; import Someone from "../../Image/someone.png"; export default function Profile() { window.addEventListener("scroll", () => { let varlueScrol = window.scrollY; document.getElementById("stars").style.left = varlueScrol * 0.25 + "px"; document.getElementById("moon").style.top = varlueScrol * 1.05 + "px"; document.getElementById("mountain_behind").style.top = varlueScrol * 0.5 + "px"; document.getElementById("mountain_front").style.left = varlueScrol * 0 + "px"; document.getElementById("text").style.marginRight = varlueScrol * 4 + "px"; document.getElementById("text").style.marginTop = varlueScrol * 0.9 + "px"; document.getElementById("btn").style.marginTop = varlueScrol * 0.7 + "px"; document.getElementById("someone").style.marginLeft = varlueScrol * 0.05 + "px"; }); return (
